title: Iran's strategy: Expand war, increase cost, outlast Donald Trump
summary_full: Iran's survival hinges on escalating regional conflict, aiming to raise the cost for the US through attacks on oil infrastructure and shipping.  This strategy seeks to pressure President Trump into withdrawing by disrupting global economies and exhausting enemy defenses.  Analysts believe Iran is prepared for a prolonged struggle, testing international will.
